calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2008 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-03-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-03-2007 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-08-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha & Carla Amador, CSR: Helen Soprep-Matley 225 (Department 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Marcia Shew, is present.
Attorney, Roger Meredith, is present representing the the Plaintiff

Defendants, Rodolfo Billedo and Perla Carrasco, are not present.
(Settlement reached as to defendant, Century 21st Alliance Real Estate Brokerage)

This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assign from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing as to Rodolfo Billedo and Perla Carrasco ONLY. Marcia Shew is sworn and examined under direct examination by Roger Meredith.

Per stipulation of counsel, the cross complaint is dismissed without prejudice. Plaintiff's oral motion to amend the complaint to add the defendant's, Perla Carrasco, AKA is GRANTED. The complaint is amended as follows: Perla Carrasco's AKA are PERLA GACAD CARRASCO AND PERLA CARRASCO BILLEDO. The Court sets the matter on the dismissal calendar as to defendant, Century 21st Alliance Real Estate Brokerage, on July 8, 2008 at 10:00 a.m. in Department 212.

The Court after hearing the testimony and evidence presented by the plaintiff, the Court takes the matter under submission. Plaintiff's counsel to submit a proposed judgment to Department 218.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2007 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery, For Appearance At Deposition, For Production Of Documents, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-24-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Angela T. Mitchell, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Marcia Shew

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. 1) Plaintiff Marcia Shew's motion to compel responses to special interrogatories and request for production of documents. Granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendants are ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order.
2) Plaintiff Marcia Shew's motion to compel attendance at deposition. Granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendants are ordered to contact counsel for plaintiff within 15 days of notice of this order to schedule the depositions. The depositions shall be completed within 45 days of notice of this order.
Monetary sanctions in the amount of $1,396 are to be paid within 45 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
